title: Login with Google
preconditions: The app is open and the login screen is displayed.
test_steps: Open the app and navigate to the login screen. | Click on the Google button in the 'Connect with' section. | Sign in with the provided Google account credentials. | Verify that the user is logged in successfully.
expected_result: The user is logged into the app successfully.

title: Login with email
preconditions: The app is open and the login screen is displayed.
test_steps: Open the app and navigate to the login screen. | Click on the 'Enter your email address' input field. | Enter a valid email address. | Click on the 'Enter your password' input field. | Enter a valid password. | Click on the 'Login' button. | Verify that the user is logged in successfully.
expected_result: The user is logged into the app successfully.

title: Login with invalid email
preconditions: The app is open and the login screen is displayed.
test_steps: Open the app and navigate to the login screen. | Click on the 'Enter your email address' input field. | Enter an invalid email address. | Click on the 'Enter your password' input field. | Enter a valid password. | Click on the 'Login' button. | Verify that an error message is displayed indicating an invalid email address.
expected_result: An error message is displayed indicating an invalid email address.

title: Login with empty email
preconditions: The app is open and the login screen is displayed.
test_steps: Open the app and navigate to the login screen. | Click on the 'Enter your email address' input field. | Enter an empty email address. | Click on the 'Enter your password' input field. | Enter a valid password. | Click on the 'Login' button. | Verify that an error message is displayed indicating an empty email address.
expected_result: An error message is displayed indicating an empty email address.

title: Login with invalid password
preconditions: The app is open and the login screen is displayed.
test_steps: Open the app and navigate to the login screen. | Click on the 'Enter your email address' input field. | Enter a valid email address. | Click on the 'Enter your password' input field. | Enter an invalid password. | Click on the 'Login' button. | Verify that an error message is displayed indicating an invalid password.
expected_result: An error message is displayed indicating an invalid password.
